        apply HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner
      -- Use the fact that the derivative of the inner product is the inner product of the derivatives
      have h₅ : HasPartialDerivAt (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) (⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) pbar.innerParams :=
        by
          -- Use the chain rule to differentiate the composition of functions
          have h₆ := h₄.hasPartialDerivAt (by norm_num [FiniteDimensional.finrank_pos : 0 < (3 : ℕ)])

          have h₇ : (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by

            <;> norm_num <;>
            (try ring_nf) <;>
            (try simp_all [inner, Matrix.dotProduct, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons]) <;>
            (try norm_num) <;>
            (try linarith)
          -- Use the specific form of the Jacobian to get the partial derivative
          have h₈ : (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
            exact h₇
          -- Use the specific form of the Jacobian to get the partial derivative
          have h₉ : HasPartialDerivAt (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) (⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) pbar.innerParams := by
            convert h₆.hasPartialDerivAt (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) using 1
            <;> simp_all [h₈]
            <;> norm_num
            <;> linarith
          exact h₉
        exact h₅.hasPartialDerivWithinAt
      -- Scale the derivative by the inverse norm
      have h₁₀ : HasPartialDerivWithinAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ : ℝ) * (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) x) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) (Set.univ : Set ℝ³) pbar.innerParams := by
        have h₁₁ : HasPartialDerivWithinAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) x) (⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) (Set.univ : Set ℝ³) pbar.innerParams := h₃
        have h₁₂ : HasPartialDerivWithinAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ : ℝ) * (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) x) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) (Set.univ : Set ℝ³) pbar.innerParams := by
          convert HasPartialDerivWithinAt.const_mul (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ : ℝ) h₁₁ using 1 <;> ring
        exact h₁₂
      -- Unwrap the derivative of the scaled function
      have h₁₃ : (fun x : ℝ³ => (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ : ℝ) * (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) x) = fun x => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x := by
        funext x
        simp [rotproj_inner_unit, div_eq_mul_inv]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [norm_eq_abs]
        <;> simp [abs_of_nonneg]
        <;> linarith [norm_nonneg pc.S]
      rw [h₁₃] at h₁₀
      exact h₁₀
    -- Use the derived partial derivative to conclude the proof
    have h₁₄ : HasPartialDerivWithinAt (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) (Set.univ : Set ℝ³) pbar.innerParams := h₃
    convert h₁₄ using 1 <;> simp_all [Set.univ]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> linarith
  -- Use the derived partial derivative to conclude the proof
  have h₃ : (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := rfl
  have h₄ : deriv (fun x : ℝ => x) pbar.innerParams.ofLp 2 = 1 := by
    simp [deriv_id]
  have h₅ : HasPartialDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) x) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) pbar.innerParams := by
    have h₆ : HasPartialDerivWithinAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) x) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) (Set.univ : Set ℝ³) pbar.innerParams := h₂
    have h₇ : HasPartialDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) x) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) pbar.innerParams := by
      convert h₆.hasPartialDerivAt using 1 <;> simp_all [Set.univ]
      <;> norm_num
      <;> linarith
    exact h₇
  -- Combine the results to get the final answer
  have h₆ : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    have h₇ : deriv (fun x : ℝ => x) pbar.innerParams.ofLp 2 = 1 := by
      simp [deriv_id]
    have h₈ : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
      -- Use the partial derivative to find the derivative in the direction of the third axis
      have h₉ : HasPartialDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) x) (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) pbar.innerParams := h₅
      have h₁₀ : deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) x) pbar.innerParams (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
        -- Use the partial derivative to find the derivative in the direction of the third axis
        have h₁₁ := h₉.deriv
        simp_all [Pi.single_apply, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero, EuclideanSpace.fderiv]
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try simp_all [inner, Matrix.dotProduct, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons])
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith)
      -- Use the partial derivative to find the derivative in the direction of the third axis
      have h₁₂ : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = deriv (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) x) pbar.innerParams (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) := by
        simp [EuclideanSpace.fderiv]
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try simp_all [inner, Matrix.dotProduct, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons])
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith)
      rw [h₁₂]
      exact h₁₀
    exact h₈
  -- Combine the results to get the final answer
  simp_all [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu]
  <;>
  (try ring_nf) <;>
  (try field_simp [pc.norm_S_ne_zero]) <;>
  (try simp_all [inner, Matrix.dotProduct, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons]) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try linarith)

have h1 : ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 2 (pc.fu) pbar.innerParams = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    have h2 : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) =
        ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
      have h3 : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) =
          (fderiv ℝ (fun x => (∑ i : Fin 3, x i * pbar.hasComponent i) / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) := by
        congr
        <;> unfold rotproj_inner_unit rotproj_inner rotprojRM
        <;> simp [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
        <;> ext
        <;> simp [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
        <;> ring
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (∑ i : Fin 3, x i * pbar.hasComponent i) / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) =
          (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (∑ i : Fin 3, x i * pbar.hasComponent i)) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) / ‖pc.S‖ := by
        convert ((hasFDerivAt_id (pbar.innerParams) |>.congr_of_eventuallyEq (Filter.eventually_of_forall fun x => by simp [div_eq_mul_inv]))
          ).div_const ‖pc.S‖ using 1
        <;> simp [fderiv_const_smul]
        <;> field_simp
        <;> ring
      rw [h4]
      have h5 : (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (∑ i : Fin 3, x i * pbar.hasComponent i)) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) = ⟪pbar.hasComponent (2 : Fin 3), (1 : ℝ)⟫ := by
        have h6 : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (∑ i : Fin 3, x i * pbar.hasComponent i)) (continuousLinearMap_euclideanBasis' 2 ℝ pbar.hasComponent (2 : Fin 3)) pbar.innerParams := by
          -- Derivative of the sum of x_i * v_i is v_i for each i
          have h7 : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (∑ i : Fin 3, x i * pbar.hasComponent i)) (continuousLinearMap_euclideanBasis' 2 ℝ pbar.hasComponent (2 : Fin 3)) pbar.innerParams := by
            -- Use the fact that the derivative of x_i is 1 for each i
            have h8 : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (∑ i : Fin 3, x i * pbar.hasComponent i)) (continuousLinearMap_euclideanBasis' 2 ℝ pbar.hasComponent (2 : Fin 3)) pbar.innerParams := by
              -- Use the chain rule to differentiate the sum
              convert (hasFDerivAt_pi 2 (pbar.innerParams)).smul_const (pbar.hasComponent (2 : Fin 3)) using 1
              <;> simp [continuousLinearMap_euclideanBasis', continuousLinearMap_apply]
              <;> ring_nf
              <;> simp_all [Fin.sum_univ_succ]
              <;> aesop
            exact h8
          exact h7
        -- Use the fact that the derivative of x_i is 1 for each i
        have h9 : (continuousLinearMap_euclideanBasis' 2 ℝ pbar.hasComponent (2 : Fin 3)) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) = ⟪pbar.hasComponent (2 : Fin 3), (1 : ℝ)⟫ := by
          simp [continuousLinearMap_euclideanBasis', ContinuousLinearMap.coe_toFun, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_toFun]
          <;> simp_all [EuclideanSpace.single_apply, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
          <;> aesop
        -- Combine the results
        have h10 : (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => (∑ i : Fin 3, x i * pbar.hasComponent i)) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) = ⟪pbar.hasComponent (2 : Fin 3), (1 : ℝ)⟫ := by
          convert h6.deriv _ using 1
          <;> simp_all [h9]
          <;> aesop
        exact h10
      rw [h5]
      have h11 : ⟪pbar.hasComponent (2 : Fin 3), (1 : ℝ)⟫ = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
        -- Prove that the 2nd component of hasComponent is pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟩
        simp [pbar.hasComponent, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ,
          Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ] at *
        <;>
        (try simp_all [inner_inner]) <;>
        (try ring_nf at *) <;>
        (try field_simp at *) <;>
        (try norm_num at *) <;>
        (try linarith)
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
            <;>
            norm_num at *
            <;>
            linarith
          })
      rw [h11]
      <;> field_simp [pc.norm_S_ne_zero]
      <;> ring
      <;> simp_all [inner_inner]
      <;> norm_num
      <;> linarith
    have h12 : ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 2 (pc.fu) pbar.innerParams = ‖pc.S‖ * (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) := by
      simp [nth_partial]
      <;>
      (try ring_nf)
      <;>
      (try simp_all [inner_inner])
      <;>
      (try norm_num)
      <;>
      (try linarith)
    rw [h12]
    have h13 : ‖pc.S‖ * (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : ℝ³) = ‖pc.S‖ * (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) := by
      rw [h2]
      <;>
      (try ring_nf)
      <;>
      (try simp_all [inner_inner])
      <;>
      (try norm_num)
      <;>
      (try linarith)
    rw [h13]
    have h14 : ‖pc.S‖ * (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
      have h15 : ‖pc.S‖ ≠ 0 := by
        intro h16
        have h17 : ‖pc.S‖ > 0 := pc.norm_S_gt_zero
        linarith
      field_simp [h15]
      <;> ring
      <;> simp_all [inner_inner]
      <;> norm_num
      <;> linarith
    rw [h14]
    <;>
    (try ring_nf)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [inner_inner])
    <;>
    (try norm_num)
    <;>
    (try linarith)
  
  exact h1

have h₁ : ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 2 pc.fu pbar.innerParams =
    ‖pc.S‖ * (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) := by
    simp [nth_partial]
    <;> simp_all [EuclideanSpace.partial_two]
    <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all [fderiv]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner_unit]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner']) <;>
    (try simp_all [hasFDerivAt_rotproj_inner])
  
  have h₂ : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    have h₃ : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = (fderiv ℝ (fun x => ⟪rotprojRM (x.ofLp 1) (x.ofLp 2) (x.ofLp 0) pc.S, pc.w⟫ / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) := by
      simp [rotproj_inner_unit]
      <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [fderiv]) <;>
      (try simp_all [rotproj_inner]) <;>
      (try simp_all [rotproj_inner']) <;>
      (try simp_all [hasFDerivAt_rotproj_inner])
    rw [h₃]
    have h₄ : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => ⟪rotprojRM (x.ofLp 1) (x.ofLp 2) (x.ofLp 0) pc.S, pc.w⟫ / ‖pc.S‖) ( (1 / ‖pc.S‖ : ℝ) • ( (pbar.sφ * pbar.sθ * pc.w 1 + pbar.sθ * pbar.cφ * pc.w 0) * pbar.sθ * pbar(cφ) * pbar.sφ )) pbar.innerParams := by
      sorry
    have h₅ : (fderiv ℝ (fun x : ℝ³ => ⟪rotprojRM (x.ofLp 1) (x.ofLp 2) (x.ofLp 0) pc.S, pc.w⟫ / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = (1 / ‖pc.S‖ : ℝ) • ( (pbar.sφ * pbar.sθ * pc.w 1 + pbar.sθ * pbar.cφ * pc.w 0) * pbar.sθ * pbar(cφ) * pbar.sφ ) := by
      sorry
    have h₆ : (1 / ‖pc.S‖ : ℝ) • ( (pbar.sφ * pbar.sθ * pc.w 1 + pbar.sθ * pbar.cφ * pc.w 0) * pbar.sθ * pbar(cφ) * pbar.sφ ) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
      sorry
    rw [h₅]
    rw [h₆]
    <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all [fderiv]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner']) <;>
    (try simp_all [hasFDerivAt_rotproj_inner])
  
  have h₃ : ‖pc.S‖ * (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = ‖pc.S‖ * (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) := by
    rw [h₂]
    <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all [fderiv]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner']) <;>
    (try simp_all [hasFDerivAt_rotproj_inner])
  
  have h₄ : ‖pc.S‖ * (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    have h₅ : ‖pc.S‖ ≠ 0 := by
      have h₅₁ : 0 < ‖pc.S‖ := GlobalTheoremPrecondition.norm_S_gt_zero pc
      linarith
    have h₆ : ‖pc.S‖ * ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ = 1 := by
      field_simp [h₅]
    calc
      ‖pc.S‖ * (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) = (‖pc.S‖ * ‖pc.S‖⁻¹) * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
        ring
      _ = 1 * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by rw [h₆]
      _ = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by ring
    <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all [fderiv]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner']) <;>
    (try simp_all [hasFDerivAt_rotproj_inner])
  
  calc
    ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 2 pc.fu pbar.innerParams = ‖pc.S‖ * (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) := by rw [h₁]
    _ = ‖pc.S‖ * (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) := by rw [h₃]
    _ = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by rw [h₄]
    <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all [fderiv]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner]) <;>
    (try simp_all [rotproj_inner']) <;>
    (try simp_all [hasFDerivAt_rotproj_inner])

have h_norm_nonzero : ‖pc.S‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have h₀ : 0 < ‖pc.S‖ := by
      apply GlobalTheoremPrecondition.norm_S_gt_zero
    exact ne_of_gt h₀
  
  have h_deriv : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams := by
    have h₁ : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x) (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams := by
      apply HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner
    have h₂ : HasFDerivAt (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x : ℝ) / ‖pc.S‖) (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams := by
      convert HasFDerivAt.div_const h₁ ‖pc.S‖ using 1
      <;> field_simp
      <;> ring
    have h₃ : (fun x : ℝ³ => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) = (fun x : ℝ³ => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x : ℝ) / ‖pc.S‖) := by
      funext x
      simp [rotproj_inner_unit]
    rw [h₃] at *
    exact h₂
  
  have h_partial : (nth_partial 2 pc.fu pbar.innerParams : ℝ) = (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) : ℝ) / ‖pc.S‖ := by
    have h₁ : (nth_partial 2 pc.fu pbar.innerParams : ℝ) = (derivative (fun x : ℝ³ => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : (ℝ³) →L[ℝ] ℝ) := by
      simp [pc.fu, nth_partial, Indexing.derivative_apply, Function.comp]
      <;>
      congr 1 <;>
      ext1 x <;>
      simp [rotproj_inner_unit, rotproj_inner]
      <;>
      rfl
    have h₂ : (derivative (fun x : ℝ³ => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) pbar.innerParams) = (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w / ‖pc.S‖) := by
      apply HasFDerivAt.deriv
      exact h_deriv
    rw [h₁, h₂]
    <;>
    simp [ContinuousLinearMap.ext_iff, ContinuousLinearMap.add_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight_apply]
    <;>
    field_simp [h_norm_nonzero]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [ContinuousLinearMap.ext_iff, ContinuousLinearMap.add_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smulRight_apply]
    <;>
    aesop
  
  have h_rotproj_inner' : (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) : ℝ) = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    simp [rotproj_inner', Matrix.of_apply, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero]
    <;>
    simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_two]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    aesop
  
  have h_final : ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 2 pc.fu pbar.innerParams = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    calc
      ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 2 pc.fu pbar.innerParams = ‖pc.S‖ * ((rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) : ℝ) / ‖pc.S‖) := by
        rw [h_partial]
      _ = (rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) : ℝ) := by
        field_simp [h_norm_nonzero]
        <;> ring
      _ = ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
        rw [h_rotproj_inner']
  
  exact h_final

    exact h
  simp [h2] at *

    try norm_num <;>
